# `vbmClearDot`

**Systems:** VIC20  
**Parameters:** `b,b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>vbmClearDot( [byte-x], [byte-y] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[byte-x] - X position 0-159</li>
    <li>[byte-y] - Y position 0-191</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
Clears a dot at the X and Y position.
</p>

<h3>Example</h3>
<code>
    vbmClearDot( 50, 100 );
</code>

</div>
